name: Abhay
overview: Inspired by true events, the crime thriller revolves around Abhay Pratap Singh, a sharp investigating officer with the mind of a criminal, who can go to any extent to solve a case. Join Abhay as he sets out in the dark gruesome world of crime to save innocent lives, while dealing with his own personal demons.

trailers.title: Abhay Web Series | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Kunal Kemmu | Streaming Now On ZEE5
